The group was dismantled with the capture of its last leader in September 2017.

Hezbollah.description: Hezbollah is a Lebanese Shia Islamist political party and paramilitary group founded in 1982 by Lebanese clerics in response to the Israeli invasion of Lebanon. Its paramilitary wing is considered equivalent to a medium-sized army.

Chicago Outfit.description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Chicago, Illinois, originating in the early 1910s. Rose to power under Johnny Torrio and Al Capone during Prohibition, engaging in bootlegging, gambling, loansharking, extortion, and murder. Considered one of the most violent Mafia families in the US, with over 1,000 murders since the 1920s. Still active but declined due to law enforcement and attrition.

Serb Volunteer Guard.description: Elite Serbian volunteer paramilitary unit founded and led by Željko Ražnatović (Arkan) on 11 October 1990. Fought in the Croatian and Bosnian Wars, known for discipline and effectiveness but also responsible for war crimes and massacres. La Línea.description: La Línea is the main faction of the Juárez Cartel, originally formed as an execution unit composed of former police and military personnel trained in urban combat. Based in Ciudad Juárez, Mexico, it was founded in 2008 by Juan Pablo Ledezma. The group is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and kidnappings, and has been linked to several high-profile massacres. It has formed alliances with Barrio Azteca and the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG) to fight against the Sinaloa Cartel.
